data.title: Encryption
data.description: Ensures data security and privacy by encrypting user data both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Employs strong user authentication methods to safeguard accounts.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes OAuth 2.0 for secure and delegated access.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Implementing protocols to quickly respond to security incidents.
data.technical_spec: Automated alerts and a dedicated team for rapid incident management.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent audits and penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Third-party cybersecurity firms are contracted for periodic evaluations.

data.title: Access Control
data.description: Deploys strict access control measures to protect user data.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access with advanced IAM policies.
